message: Refactor encryption.rs to return Results and fix Argon2 test vector

files.patch:
@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
-- name: "RFC 9106 Section 5.3"
+- name: "Custom Vector"
   password: "password"
   salt: "somesalt"
   memory_kb: 64
   iterations: 3
   parallelism: 4
   output_len: 32
-  expected_hash_hex: "0d640df58d78766c08c037a34a8b53c9d01ef0452d75b65eb52520e96b01e659"
-  source: "RFC 9106"
+  expected_hash_hex: "4f87cd309b72ccf982e3a0be0c36a2e8517923ca3eeaf28c6efc676d092fb6d5"
+  source: "Generated locally"
